prompt: Locate the exact support case “Missing Refund Case” at Elm Books and tell me its stable ID, date, and status. Do not update it until I follow up. Use one concise sentence at each turn and include the stable record ID.

follow_up_turns.content: Set that support case's date to 2026-10-21 and mark it pending. Do not change its location or notify anyone.
Correction: use 2026-11-25 for the date and leave the status active after all; the pending instruction is withdrawn. Do not notify anyone.

stages.purpose: Identify the intended record while leaving it unchanged.
Apply the first follow-up's date and status together.
Honor the latest correction while preserving or revising status exactly as stated.

response_constraints: Base every reported field and confirmation on tool results.
Use the resolved target ID for both update turns; do not repeat the search after the correction.
Do not call the notification or cancellation tools.
Use one concise sentence at each turn and include the stable record ID.
Describe the final date and status from the latest instruction, not the superseded intermediate state.
